# zstack_sns_email_endpoint (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage SNS email endpoints in ZStack. An SNS email endpoint receives notifications by email.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email address for the SNS email endpoint.
- `name` (String) The name of the SNS email endpoint.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the SNS email endpoint.
- `platform_uuid` (String) The UUID of the SNS platform.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The current state of the SNS email endpoint.
- `type` (String) The endpoint type.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the SNS email endpoint.
